applicationAdvancedCluster.title: Cluster Settings
applicationAdvancedCluster.description: Modify swarm settings for the service.
applicationAdvancedCluster.alertRedeploy: Please remember to click Redeploy after modify the cluster settings to apply the changes.
applicationAdvancedCluster.emptyRegistryRich: To use a cluster feature, you need to configure at least a registry first. Please, go to <link>Settings</link> to do so.
